concerns.text: Tasks implement CodeParrot/CodeGen (T008-T009) despite plan.md Constitutional Check VI being BLOCKING. Plan states 'Research CANNOT complete until amendment approved OR spec revised' but tasks proceed as if resolved. This is silent constitution drift.

Tasks implement radon/pylint (T015-T016) despite plan.md Constitutional Check VII being BLOCKING. Constitution VII requires TinyLlama-1.1B. Plan states 'Research CANNOT complete until amendment approved OR spec revised' but tasks proceed as if resolved.

T027 creates 'pilot study validation stub' for FR-011. FR-011 requires actual validation (n≥50, r≥0.5) OR peer-reviewed citation. A stub does not deliver the required validation workflow—semantic weakening of FR-011.
SC-003 requires statistical power ≥0.8 measurement. No task implements power analysis or verifies this threshold. Acceptance criterion dropped from tasks.

Plan.md Complexity Tracking documents independence assumption violation (CodeSearchNet snippets may share authors/repositories). Plan says 'subsampling to one snippet per repository OR documenting cluster-robust SE limitation' but no task implements either mitigation.
Constitution V requires artifact hashes and updated_at timestamps in state YAML. No task implements state file hash tracking and timestamp updates. Constitutional principle not preserved in tasks.

T013 implements 'dataset verification workflow' but plan.md Constitutional Check II states 'NO verified source found'. Logical contradiction: verification cannot succeed without a verified source. Task is impossible as specified.

FR-008 requires 'community-standard justification' documentation for thresholds. T026 covers sensitivity analysis but does not explicitly implement justification documentation. Make staging explicit in spec if deferred.
